The main claim is: Future Work ----------- I think when you use CoT (and explain-then-predict methods more generally), the reason for the final prediction factors into (A) the CoT explanation, and (B) the reason that the model produced the CoT explanation.
One can leverage these features to bias models towards incorrect answers.
